name: The Doon School
description: Known as the 'Eton of India', this all-boys school is famous for its academic excellence and notable alumni.
extraData: One of India's most prestigious schools with a legacy of producing world leaders, CEOs, and artists.

name: Mayo College
description: One of the oldest boarding schools in India, with a rich heritage and a campus known for its architectural beauty.
extraData: Known as the 'Eton of the East', it boasts a massive campus with its own museum and polo grounds.

name: Welham Girls' School
description: A premier girls' boarding school focusing on holistic development and academic success.
extraData: Consistently ranked as the top girls' boarding school in India for its academic and extracurricular balance.

name: The Lawrence School, Sanawar
description: One of the oldest co-educational schools in the world, situated in the beautiful hills of Sanawar.
extraData: A historical military-heritage school that has transitioned into a premier modern educational institution.

name: The Scindia School
description: Located atop the historic Gwalior Fort, it offers a blend of tradition and modern education.
extraData: Uniquely situated inside the Gwalior Fort, providing students with a deep sense of history and discipline.

name: Woodstock School
description: An international co-educational residential school located in the Himalayan foothills.
extraData: One of the oldest international schools in Asia, offering a globally recognized IB and American curriculum.

name: Rishi Valley School
description: Founded by J. Krishnamurti, it is known for its unique educational philosophy and serene environment.
extraData: Focuses on alternative education, environmental awareness, and a deep philosophical approach to learning.

name: Sherwood College
description: A prestigious school in Nainital, known for its focus on personality development and sports.
extraData: Alma mater of legendary Bollywood star Amitabh Bachchan, Sherwood is famous for its cultural and sporting heritage.

name: Bishop Cotton School
description: One of the oldest boarding schools for boys in Asia, located in the scenic hills of Shimla.
extraData: Known for its house system and producing 'Old Cottonians' who have excelled in the Indian Armed Forces and Diplomacy.

name: Welham Boys' School
description: A premier boys' boarding school with a legacy of producing well-rounded individuals.
extraData: Focuses on providing a 'home away from home' environment while maintaining strict academic and sporting standards.

name: Kodaikanal International School
description: An autonomous residential school offering the IB curriculum in the beautiful hills of Kodaikanal.
extraData: The first school in India to adopt the International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Program.

name: Mayo College Girls' School
description: The sister school of Mayo College, offering world-class residential facilities for girls.
extraData: A leading girls' residential school known for its excellence in performing arts, sports, and international exchange programs.

name: Chinmaya International Residential School
description: Combines spiritual values with a global educational standard (IB and CBSE).
extraData: Blends Indian culture and Vedic values with modern international pedagogy.

name: Mussoorie International School
description: An all-girls boarding school providing a blend of traditional values and modern teaching.
extraData: Located in the serene hills of Mussoorie, focusing on empowering girls through leadership and values.

name: Ecole Globale International Girls' School
description: A fully residential girls' school offering both CIE and CBSE curricula.
extraData: Known for its world-class infrastructure and being one of the fastest-growing elite girls' schools in India.

name: Daly College
description: A co-educational school with a rich history and a strong emphasis on extracurricular activities.
extraData: One of the founder members of the Indian Public Schools' Conference, with a strong focus on Round Square values.

name: Birla Public School
description: Known for its discipline and strong academic foundation in the educational hub of Pilani.
extraData: Famously known as Vidya Niketan, it is a premier residential school in Rajasthan focusing on discipline.

name: Pathways World School
description: A premium IB world school with sustainable infrastructure and a global outlook.
extraData: A LEED Gold certified sustainable school offering premium IB education in the NCR region.

name: Good Shepherd International School
description: Offers diverse international curricula and exceptional facilities in the Nilgiris.
extraData: Features state-of-the-art facilities for sports, music, and arts, and is a major hub for international students.

name: Scindia Kanya Vidyalaya
description: A premier residential school for girls, focusing on leadership and independence.
extraData: Founded by the late Rajmata Vijayraje Scindia to empower Indian girls with modern education and traditional values.

name: The International School Bangalore
description: A world-class co-ed school offering a globally recognized curriculum.
extraData: Regularly ranks among the top international schools globally for its IB and IGCSE results.

name: SelaQui International School
description: Focuses on providing a balanced education with equal emphasis on sports and academics.
extraData: Offers a personalized learning experience with a strong focus on career counseling and university placements.

name: Unison World School
description: An all-girls school with modern facilities and international tie-ups.
extraData: Collaborates with prestigious international schools for exchange programs, enhancing global exposure for girls.

name: Sahyadri School
description: A Krishnamurti school located in the Tiwai Hills, known for its eco-friendly campus.
extraData: Emphasizes a non-competitive learning environment, focusing on self-awareness and ecological sustainability.

name: Modern School, Barakhamba Road
description: A premier day school in India's capital, known for its balance of academics, sports, and culture.
extraData: One of the most iconic schools in Delhi, known for its strong alumni network in politics, arts, and business.

name: Vasant Valley School
description: Renowned for its progressive learning environment and consistently high academic results.
extraData: Consistently ranked as the top day school in India for its modern approach and inclusive culture.

name: SAI International School
description: Consistently ranked as India's #1 school, known for its global outlook and academic standards.
extraData: India's No.1 School (Ranked by EducationWorld) for multiple years, known for global student exchange programs.

name: KIIT International School
description: A boutique international school offering IB, IGCSE, and CBSE curricula.
extraData: A world-class residential school under the prestigious KIIT Group, focusing on holistic child development.

name: DAV Public School, Chandrasekharpur
description: A powerhouse of academic performance, renowned for national competitive excellence.
extraData: Produces the highest number of IIT and Medical qualifiers in eastern India every year.

name: ODM Global School
description: A pioneer in 360-degree holistic education, combining global pedagogy with high-tech infrastructure.
extraData: The first school in Odisha to provide a global campus with international trainers and coaches.

name: Delhi Public School (DPS), Kalinga
description: An architectural marvel offering a blend of traditional values and modern excellence.
extraData: Known for its massive campus and excellent sports facilities in the twin city region.

name: Mother's Public School
description: Renowned for its compassionate approach and outstanding board results.
extraData: Highly respected for its student-centric approach and consistently high performance in CBSE board exams.

name: Loyola School
description: A prestigious Jesuit institution focusing on character building and leadership.
extraData: Follows the Jesuit philosophy of education, emphasizing 'Magis' or excellence in all facets of life.

name: Sainik School Bhubaneswar
description: The premier gateway to the NDA, fostering discipline, patriotism, and grit.
extraData: A residential military school that prepares boys for the National Defence Academy (NDA).

name: St. Paul's School
description: A legendary institution in western Odisha, known for its academic rigor.
extraData: A premier Catholic institution in western Odisha with a long-standing reputation for discipline and academic success.

name: Dhirubhai Ambani International School
description: An elite international school in Mumbai, providing a globally recognized education.
extraData: Regularly ranked among the top IB schools in the world, with exceptional Ivy League placement rates.

name: Cathedral and John Connon School
description: A historic institution in South Mumbai with a legacy of excellence spanning over 160 years.
extraData: A heritage school in Fort Mumbai, known for its rigorous academics and influential alumni network.

name: Bishop's School
description: A prominent institution in Pune with a history of excellence in both academics and sports.
extraData: One of Pune's most iconic schools, famous for its boxing tradition and military-style discipline.

name: Yadavindra Public School
description: A prestigious boarding school in Punjab, known for its massive campus and royal heritage.
extraData: Founded by the Maharaja of Patiala, it is one of the premier residential schools in North India.

name: St. John's High School
description: A legendary school in Chandigarh, known for its academic rigor and holistic growth.
extraData: Consistently ranked as the top school in Chandigarh for its academic and value-based education.

name: St. Paul's School
description: One of the oldest and most prestigious boarding schools in Asia, situated in the Himalayas.
extraData: Situated at an altitude of 7,500 feet, it is often called the 'Eton of the East' for its hill-school heritage.

name: La Martiniere for Boys
description: A historic school in Kolkata with a strong emphasis on tradition and academic rigor.
extraData: One of Kolkata's most prestigious institutions, famous for its debating culture and academic excellence.

name: The Rajkumar College
description: A princely institution known for its holistic development and historic campus.
extraData: Originally established for the education of the princes of Saurashtra, it is now a leading public school.

name: The Heritage School
description: Known for its innovative experiential learning model and world-class sports facilities.
extraData: A pioneer in experiential learning, it focuses on building empathy and critical thinking in students.
